metadata.title: Levcon.ai — AI Consulting & Training from Vienna
metadata.description: Levcon.ai — AI consulting and training from Vienna. AI with Method, Impact with System. Mst. Enric-Bernard Sep-Albi helps companies deploy AI effectively, securely, and without the hype.
metadata.og_title: Levcon.ai — AI Consulting & Training from Vienna
metadata.og_description: AI with Method, Impact with System. AI consulting and training for companies in the Austrian and German-speaking market.

about.statement: I am Enric-Bernard Sep-Albi — AI Trainer and Organisational Developer based in Vienna. I help companies deploy artificial intelligence effectively, securely, and without the hype.
body: With over ten years of experience in IT consulting and enterprise environments, I understand how companies really work — and where AI makes a measurable difference. Not in presentations, but in the daily work of your employees.

My approach always starts with the goal, not the technology. Together we define what your company wants to achieve concretely. Only then do we select the right tools — while keeping data protection and governance firmly in focus.
In training sessions I focus on applied knowledge: your employees leave the workshop with skills they can use the very next morning. No lecture-style presentations, no buzzword bingo.
I don't sell software or platforms. Levcon.ai stands for clarity, structure and effectiveness — for companies in the Austrian and German-speaking market.

schulungen.title: AI Training
schulungen.lead: Every training is individually designed — tailored to your audience, your processes and your goal. No standard programme, no off-the-shelf slides.

items.outcome: Assess AI strategically, evaluate opportunities and risks, make informed decisions — without technical background.
Use AI tools confidently in daily work — from the first prompt to structured automation.
Understand, evaluate and securely integrate AI infrastructure — from API access to local model deployment.
Training that speaks your language — with examples, processes and tools from your industry.

framework.title: The Framework
framework.lead: Every engagement starts with a clear method. GOAL → LEVER → CONTROL is the structured way Levcon.ai thinks, plans and implements AI projects.

steps.title: Goal
paragraphs: What should AI concretely achieve in your company? We start with the measurable outcome, not the technology. What problem are we solving — and for whom?

steps.title: Lever
paragraphs: Where does AI have the greatest leverage? We identify the right tools, processes and interfaces — separating hype from real value.

steps.title: Control
paragraphs: How do you maintain oversight? AI projects need clear governance, measurable KPIs and an operating plan. Control is the foundation of lasting trust.

Success is measured concretely — not felt. Depending on the project, we track hours saved, reduced error rates, shorter throughput times or team adoption rates. Metrics are defined together before the project begins.

privacy.title: Privacy Model
privacy.lead: Three tiers. One promise: your data goes as far into the cloud as you want — and not one millimetre further.

tiers.name: Classic
tiers.desc: Commercial AI services with standard data protection terms. Ideal for general tasks without sensitive company data.

tiers.name: Privacy
tiers.desc: AI via business APIs, EU servers and data processing agreements (DPA). Your data is not used to train models.

tiers.name: Local
tiers.desc: Fully locally operated AI on your own infrastructure. Not a single byte leaves your servers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.lead: What I hear in almost every first conversation — answered directly.

items.q: Does our team need prior AI experience?
items.a: No — and less prior knowledge is often actually better. We start where your team is, not where textbooks begin.
No. Every training starts with a conversation about your situation. Format, duration, content and examples are defined together — there is no off-the-shelf programme.

items.q: How is the success of a project measured?
items.a: We define the metrics together before the project starts — for example hours saved per week, reduced error rates or team adoption rates. No project ends without a measurable baseline.

items.q: What does a training or consulting engagement cost?
items.a: It depends on the scope. A first conversation is free — after that you get a concrete proposal, not a price menu.

items.q: Do you only work with large companies?
items.a: No. I work with companies where AI can make a real difference — regardless of size. What matters is whether the goal is clear.

items.q: Do you sell software or tools?
items.a: No. I am tool-independent. My recommendations are based on your goal — not on commissions or partnerships.

items.q: How does a first conversation work?
items.a: 30 minutes, non-binding, no agenda pressure. I listen, ask questions, and tell you honestly whether and how I can help.

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.lead: Every good project starts with a conversation. Call or write — appointments are arranged individually.
kontakt.form_consent: I consent to the processing of my data in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
kontakt.form_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
kontakt.form_error: Error sending message. Please try again later or write directly to hello@levcon.ai.
kontakt.form_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
kontakt.form_consent_required: Please consent to the Privacy Policy.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.body:
Collection and Processing of Personal Data

Personal data is processed on this website only to the extent necessary. Processing is carried out exclusively for the stated purposes and on the basis of the applicable data protection regulations, in particular the GDPR.

Contact

When you contact us via the contact form or email, the data you provide (e.g. name, email address and content of your message) is processed for the purpose of handling your enquiry and for any follow-up questions.

Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of pre-contractual measures) or Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in efficient communication).

The data is stored only for as long as is necessary for the processing of your enquiry, the initiation or completion of a business relationship, and to fulfil statutory retention obligations.

Fonts

This website uses the fonts Cormorant Garamond and DM Sans. The font files are hosted locally on the web server. No connection to external font services is established.

Cookies

This website does not use cookies.
